page.primary_keyword: marbella yacht charter credit card fees
page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter Credit Card Fees Explained

data.meta_description: Avoid surprise charges on your Marbella yacht charter. We explain credit card fees, deposit policies, and how to pay with zero surcharge. Book now.
data.summary: Learn how credit card fees work for Marbella yacht charters. This guide covers payment methods, surcharges, deposits, and tips to avoid extra costs when booking with us.
key_facts: No credit card surcharge on bank transfers or cash payments.
Deposit of 30% secures booking; balance due 7 days before departure.
All prices include 21% Spanish IVA, skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks.
Tier A boats from €749/2h to €2,299/8h – no hidden fees.
Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) from €4,719/4h with free jet ski.
Payments processed securely via bank transfer or online link.
Full refund if cancellation made 14+ days before charter.

faq.q: Do you charge a credit card fee on Marbella yacht charters?
faq.a: Yes, a 2.5% surcharge applies for Visa and Mastercard payments, and 3.5% for American Express. We recommend bank transfer or cash to avoid this fee entirely.

faq.q: How can I pay without a credit card surcharge?
faq.a: Pay by bank transfer (SEPA or international) or cash in euros on arrival. Both methods incur zero additional fees.

faq.q: What deposit is required to book a yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: A 30% deposit is needed to confirm your reservation. The remaining 70% is due 7 days before departure. Deposits are fully refundable if cancelled 14+ days prior.

faq.q: Are there any hidden fees in your pricing?
faq.a: No. All our prices include the licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and 21% Spanish IVA. What you see is what you pay, minus any optional extras.

faq.q: Can I pay with a debit card?
faq.a: Yes, debit cards are accepted and treated like credit cards – the same 2.5% surcharge applies for Visa/Mastercard debit. Bank transfer avoids this.

faq.q: What happens if I cancel my booking?
faq.a: Cancel 14 or more days before your charter for a full refund. Within 7-13 days, you lose 50% of the deposit. Less than 7 days, no refund.

faq.q: Do you accept PayPal or other digital wallets?
faq.a: Currently we only accept bank transfer, cash, and credit/debit cards via secure online link. PayPal is not available.

faq.q: Is the credit card fee refundable if I cancel?
faq.a: No, card processing fees are non-refundable and charged by the payment gateway. If you cancel, we refund the charter amount minus the card fee.

data.body_html:
When booking a Marbella yacht charter, understanding how credit card fees work can save you money. Many operators add a surcharge for card payments, and we’re transparent about ours. This guide breaks down exactly what you’ll pay, how to avoid extra costs, and what’s included in every charter from Boat Rental Marbella.

Our Credit Card Surcharge Policy

We accept Visa, Mastercard, and American Express for all bookings. A 2.5% surcharge applies to Visa and Mastercard transactions, and 3.5% for Amex. This covers the processing fees charged by our payment gateway. To avoid this, choose bank transfer (SEPA or international) or pay in cash on arrival – both with zero surcharge.

How to Pay Without Extra Fees

The simplest way to avoid the surcharge is a bank transfer. We provide our IBAN upon booking confirmation. Alternatively, bring euros in cash to the marina on the day. Cash payments are accepted for deposits and balances. For large amounts (e.g., a €4,719 Mangusta 80 charter), bank transfer is more practical.

Deposit and Payment Schedule

To secure your Marbella yacht charter, a 30% deposit is required. The remaining 70% is due 7 days before departure. If you pay the deposit by card, the surcharge applies only to that portion. The balance can be paid via bank transfer or cash to avoid further fees. All prices include 21% Spanish IVA, so no surprises at checkout.

What’s Included in Every Charter

Our prices are all-inclusive: a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and VAT. For example, an Astondoa 40 costs from €749 for 2 hours to €2,299 for 8 hours – no hidden charges. The Mangusta 80 (Tier B) starts at €4,719 for 4 hours, which includes a free jet ski.

Why We Charge a Card Fee

Payment processors take a cut of each transaction – typically 1.5–3% for cards. Rather than absorbing this cost into our base prices (which would raise them for everyone), we pass it on only to card users. This keeps our cash and bank-transfer prices lower. It’s a common practice among yacht charter operators in Marbella and across the Costa del Sol.

Comparing Payment Methods

MethodSurchargeBest for
Bank transfer (SEPA)0%Deposits & balances
Cash (euros)0%Balance on day
Visa/Mastercard2.5%Quick deposits
American Express3.5%Large amounts

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you charge a credit card fee on Marbella yacht charters?

Yes, a 2.5% surcharge applies for Visa and Mastercard payments, and 3.5% for American Express. We recommend bank transfer or cash to avoid this fee entirely.

How can I pay without a credit card surcharge?

Pay by bank transfer (SEPA or international) or cash in euros on arrival. Both methods incur zero additional fees.

What deposit is required to book a yacht in Marbella?

A 30% deposit is needed to confirm your reservation. The remaining 70% is due 7 days before departure. Deposits are fully refundable if cancelled 14+ days prior.

Are there any hidden fees in your pricing?

No. All our prices include the licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and 21% Spanish IVA. What you see is what you pay, minus any optional extras.

Can I pay with a debit card?

Yes, debit cards are accepted and treated like credit cards – the same 2.5% surcharge applies for Visa/Mastercard debit. Bank transfer avoids this.

What happens if I cancel my booking?

Cancel 14 or more days before your charter for a full refund. Within 7-13 days, you lose 50% of the deposit. Less than 7 days, no refund.

Do you accept PayPal or other digital wallets?

Currently we only accept bank transfer, cash, and credit/debit cards via secure online link. PayPal is not available.

Is the credit card fee refundable if I cancel?

No, card processing fees are non-refundable and charged by the payment gateway. If you cancel, we refund the charter amount minus the card fee.

Understanding Marbella yacht charter credit card fees helps you budget accurately. For a stress-free booking, opt for bank transfer or cash. Browse our full fleet and check availability for your preferred dates. All charters depart from Puerto Banús, with easy access to Marbella Marina, Cabopino, and Estepona.
